image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about case reports limits than social media does.
Context visual: Case reports are anecdotal. They tell a single story.
Escalation visual: But can we generalize from one patient? What if it misleads us?
Evidence visual: Research shows case reports lack rigorous testing. They can exaggerate outcomes.
Payoff visual: Relying solely on them can lead to dangerous decisions.
Cta visual: Stay informed, trust science, and think critically. Follow for more insights!
